description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: build and cppcheck, both running on ubuntu-latest. The build job uses a matrix strategy to test with both clang and gcc compilers, installing dependencies, checking out the code, and then running a make process with the specified compiler. The cppcheck job installs cppcheck, checks out the code, and runs cppcheck analysis.
